utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey . Okay , I gave him another chance , but Tim has got to go !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No ! No ... no ! He is totally incompetent . I called the chef who recommended him to me . He said , " Ha ... ha ! Gotcha ! "

emotion_cause.span: 3_He is totally incompetent . I called the chef who recommended him to me . He said , " Ha ... ha ! Gotcha ! "

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay . Okay , but you can not fire him today .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Because I am dumping him today .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What ? ! You said he was sweet !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: He is sweet . He’s too sweet . He calls me all the time . " So did ... did you get home from work okay ? " " Did ... did you get out of the shower okay ? "

emotion_cause.span: 8_He calls me all the time . " So did ... did you get home from work okay ? " " Did ... did you get out of the shower okay ? "

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Just do not pick up your phone .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Then he comes over ! " I am so worried about you . " Uck ! Be a man !

emotion_cause.span: 10_Then he comes over ! " I am so worried about you . "

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What ? So now I am not allowed to fire him ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_So now I am not allowed to fire him ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You can not fire him and dump him the same day , he will kill himself .

emotion_cause.span: 12_You can not fire him and dump him the same day , he will kill himself .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay well then , I will fire him today and you go out with him for another week .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Are you kidding ? ! Another week with that simp , I will kill myself !

emotion_cause.span: 14_Another week with that simp , I will kill myself !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay well , then we will both do it today and he will just have to deal with it !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay . But the question is who gonna go first . Cause whoever goes second is the bitch .

emotion_cause.span: 16_But the question is who gonna go first . Cause whoever goes second is the bitch .
